segments.text: the word of the LORD of hosts came to me
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I was jealous for Zion with great jealousy, and I was jealous for her with great fury
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I am returned unto Zion, and will dwell in the midst of Jerusalem: and Jerusalem shall be called a city of truth; and the mountain of the LORD of hosts the holy mountain
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: There shall yet old men and old women dwell in the streets of Jerusalem, and every man with his staff in his hand for very age
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: very age: Heb. multitude of days

segments.text: And the streets of the city shall be full of boys and girls playing in the streets thereof
If it be marvellous in the eyes of the remnant of this people in these days, should it also be marvellous in mine eyes?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Behold, I will save my people from the east country, and from the west country
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: the west country: Heb. the country of the going down of the sun

segments.text: I will bring them, and they shall dwell in the midst of Jerusalem: and they shall be my people, and I will be their God, in truth and in righteousness
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Let your hands be strong, ye that hear in these days these words by the mouth of the prophets, which were in the day that the foundation of the house of the LORD of hosts was laid, that the temple might be built
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For before these days there was no hire for man, nor any hire for beast; neither was there any peace to him that went out or came in because of the affliction: for I set all men every one against his neighbour

footnotes: there was no hire: or, the hire of man became nothing

segments.text: I will not be unto the residue of this people as in the former days
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: the seed shall be prosperous; the vine shall give her fruit, and the ground shall give her increase, and the heavens shall give their dew; and I will cause the remnant of this people to possess all these things
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: as ye were a curse among the heathen, O house of Judah, and house of Israel; so will I save you, and ye shall be a blessing: fear not, but let your hands be strong
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: As I thought to punish you, when your fathers provoked me to wrath, and I repented not
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have thought in these days to do well unto Jerusalem and to the house of Judah: fear ye not
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: These are the things that ye shall do; Speak ye every man the truth to his neighbour; execute the judgment of truth and peace in your gates
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: execute judgment: Heb. judge truth, and the judgment of peace
heading: Exhortation to Righteousness

segments.text: let none of you imagine evil in your hearts against his neighbour; and love no false oath: for all these are things that I hate
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: the word of the LORD of hosts came unto me
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The fast of the fourth month, and the fast of the fifth, and the fast of the seventh, and the fast of the tenth, shall be to the house of Judah joy and gladness, and cheerful feasts; therefore love the truth and peace
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: feasts: or, solemn, or, set times

segments.text: It shall yet come to pass, that there shall come people, and the inhabitants of many cities
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Let us go speedily to pray before the LORD, and to seek the LORD of hosts: I will go also
segments.speaker: Inhabitants of a city

footnotes: to pray: Heb. to intreat the face of

segments.text: Many people and strong nations shall come to seek the LORD of hosts in Jerusalem, and to pray before the LORD

footnotes: to pray: Heb. to intreat the face of

segments.text: In those days it shall come to pass, that ten men shall take hold out of all languages of the nations, even shall take hold of the skirt of him that is a Jew, saying, We will go with you: for we have heard that God is with you
segments.speaker: God
